name: Tinta Web V1
tagline: Multilingual wine community website with AI-powered content features
description: The official website for Tinta Wine, a wine community platform. Features multilingual support (Spanish/English) with next-international, AI-powered content generation with OpenAI, admin panel for content management, and email-based authentication. Includes analytics tracking with Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights.
highlights: AI-powered content features with OpenAI integration
Admin panel with data tables and content management
Email-based authentication with NextAuth.js and Nodemailer
Performance monitoring with Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights
